Title: Osney Bridge diversion
Description: Towpath closed about 150 yards before bridge. Diversion via Abbey Road parallel to river, reconnecting at Botley Road.

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge closure
Description: Footbridge closed on safety grounds. 3-mile diversion via A4155 with red pedestrian signs. Train/bus available.

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge north of Sandford Lock closed. Diversion via NCN 5.

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway intermittent closure
Description: Walkway closed due to corrosion. Reopens if river levels low, closes when levels rise. Re-routed via Abingdon town centre.

Title: Temple Footbridge closure
Description: Closed May 2023 for structural repairs. Central span removed Nov 2025. Unlikely to reopen until 2028. Diversion via Marlow Bridge.

Title: Bridge 142 (Runnymede Bridge 142) closure
Description: Bridge closed Feb 2024 due to structural damage. Diversion via A308 and Egham roundabout. Expected closure until 2026 minimum.

Title: Bell Weir Lock diversion
Description: Small diversion around compound with machinery used for Bell Weir lock refurbishment works near Queen Elizabeth statue at Runnymede.

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Path closed about 1/4 mile downstream of Goring. Small diversion onto parallel Manor Road with footpath returning to river.

Title: Penton Hook Island access closure
Description: No access to island due to diseased trees. Thames Path on main bank unaffected.

Title: Ten Foot Bridge closure
Description: Bridge closed March 2024 due to structural and safety concerns. Located between Rushey and Shifford locks near Buckland, Faringdon.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank of Grand Union Canal between River Brent bridge and Brentford Marina. Parts now open via alternate routing through The Ham.
